items.visual_description: A pair of black, knee-high boots made of a suede-like material. They feature a rounded toe, a low, black chunky heel, and a decorative black strap with a silver-colored D-ring buckle around the ankle.
A pair of wire-frame eyeglasses with round lenses and thin silver-colored frames, placed on the floor as a prop.
A pair of black wireless earbuds and their charging case, placed on the floor near the boots.

overall_description: A product shot of stylish black knee-high boots made from a suede-like fabric, displayed on a fluffy white rug. The boots have a low, blocky heel and are accented with a strap and silver-colored buckle around the ankle. The scene is accessorized with props, including a pair of round, wire-rimmed eyeglasses and black wireless earbuds, placed on the floor to create a modern aesthetic.
key_features: Ankle strap with silver-colored D-ring buckle
